productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Yellow & White F5 TRX FG Sports Shoes
description: Synthetic upper for lightweight and easy cleaning, has asymmetrical lacing and flat laces for larger kicking area and better ball contactFirm heel counter to give support to your heel, raised heel tab at back heel which protects the Achilles tendon and locks the shoe in placeSoft, mesh, cushioned collarDie-cut EVA insole for comfort and light weightAgion anti-microbial treatment in the insole stops odors and prevents bacterial and fungal growth with environmentally friendly technologyLightweight Traxion outsole with fixed moulded cleatsOutsole is suitable for very hard and dry natural ground or cinder surfaces
